title: hylebia montana
intro: Hylebia montana, also known as Himalayan sweet clover, is a perennial herb native to the Himalayan region. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Hylebia montana include reducing anxiety and stress, improving sleep quality, and supporting the immune system. Hylebia montana can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and its leaves and flowers can also be consumed raw or used in cooking.
